examples: The median time to full donor myeloid cell and T cell chimerism was 4 and 8 weeks respectively.
Mixed hematopoietic chimerism is a state in which bone marrow hematopoietic stem cells from two genetically different individuals coexist.
Male donor chimerism were found on day 7 and 14 after allogeneic stem cell transplantation by Y-specific sequence and chromosome karyotype analysis.
